title: GridStatus IESO Zonal Load Forecast
description:
Hourly load forecast by zone for the Independent Electricity System Operator (IESO) in Ontario. Values are reported for all of *Ontario*, as well as the individual regions *Southeast*, *Southwest*, *Northwest*, and *Northeast*. 

Before implementation of the Market Renewal Program, IESO only reported values for *East*, *West*, and *Ontario*. For historical data prior to the MRP, see this [dataset](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/ieso_zonal_load_forecast_hourly_pre_market_renewal). 

This report is updated twice daily, morning and afternoon.
